summary: Iteration 3 verification of Aura Wealth (Expo). Frontend-only testing via Playwright on mobile viewport 390x844. All Fix #1a/1b/1c, #2a/2b/2c/2d and regressions PASS. Fix #1d has a spec deviation: when a merchant is detected but category is not, banner shows 'SMS detected' (high confidence) instead of 'Partial match — please fill in category', and the save button remains ENABLED because AddTransaction's useEffect auto-preselects the first category of the resolved type when categoryId is null. paste-sms.tsx removed as required. Old preset chips (date-0..7, range-this_month/last_month/etc) absent. RangePickerModal, DatePickerModal (react-native-calendars) and mode toggle all wired correctly. Currency switch (Settings > cur-USD) propagates to Home balance ($). 4-column category grid confirmed.

ui_bugs.issue: Fix #1d: For payload 'Rs 500 debited at RANDOMSTORE', regex detects amount(500), type(expense) AND merchant(RANDOMSTORE) => 3 hits => confidence='high' => banner text is 'SMS detected — please confirm the details'. Requirement expects 'Partial match — please fill in category' whenever the category is missing. Banner logic should key on smsBanner.missing.length>0 (or missing.includes('category')) rather than solely on confidence. Reference: /app/frontend/app/add-transaction.tsx:258-262

Fix #1d: save-tx-btn is NOT disabled after detecting SMS with unknown category. Root cause: the useEffect at lines 62-70 auto-picks the first category of the current type whenever categoryId is null, so after detectSms runs, categoryId is populated by the effect. Requirement expects save disabled until user taps a cat-* chip. Recommend tracking a flag like 'smsMissingCategory' that suppresses the auto-selection (or clear categoryId in detectSms when parsed.suggestedCategoryId is null and skip the fallback effect while smsBanner.missing includes 'category'). Reference: /app/frontend/app/add-transaction.tsx:62-70, 82-93, 388

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Emitted by shadow.card / shadow.fab in /app/frontend/src/theme.* used across screens. Non-blocking but should migrate to boxShadow / react-native's newer shadow API.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Likely from a third-party (gifted-charts / calendars). Investigate consumers and pass via style.
Console warning: 'Image: style.tintColor is deprecated. Please use props.tintColor.' Coming from Ionicons/react-native-calendars asset. Non-blocking.
Console warning: 'TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated. Please use Pressable.' Coming from react-native-calendars internal. External lib — track upstream.

action_items: Fix #1d banner text: base wording on smsBanner.missing (e.g. if missing.length>0 render 'Partial match — please fill in <missing>' regardless of confidence).

Fix #1d save enablement: prevent auto-selecting a fallback category when SMS parse leaves category missing. Options: (a) set a state 'requireCategory' true when parsed.suggestedCategoryId is null and gate the fallback useEffect on it; (b) clear categoryId in detectSms and skip the effect until the user taps a chip.
critical_code_review_comments: add-transaction.tsx: dateLabel uses toLocaleDateString – locale-dependent output; acceptable but ensure tests do not hard-match 'Mon, 6 Jul 2026'.
DatePicker.tsx: RangePickerModal loops up to 400 days to build marked dates – fine but could be O(n) on very long ranges; consider capping earlier.
sms-parser.ts: AMOUNT_RE will match currency prefix + integer only, so 'Rs 500' is captured; good.
index.tsx: qa-scan-sms passes ?mode=sms which is honored by AddTransaction via useLocalSearchParams; verified.
_layout.tsx: paste-sms Stack.Screen removed; verified. paste-sms.tsx file absent.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (2 sub-checks of Fix #1d failed; rest passed)

seed_data_creation: None. Sample data auto-seeded by seedIfNeeded() on first launch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend URL: https://spending-dashboard-47.preview.emergentagent.com. Use viewport 390x844. To test Fix #1d again, paste 'Rs 500 debited at RANDOMSTORE' in sms-textarea and click detect-btn; verify (a) banner starts with 'Partial match' and (b) save-tx-btn is disabled until a cat-* chip is tapped. Cat prefix in DOM is 'cat-cat-<id>' (e.g. cat-cat-food) because store category IDs already begin with 'cat-'.
rca_of_issue: Fix #1d fails because: (1) banner branching uses smsBanner.confidence==='high' rather than checking whether missing fields exist. For messages that have amount+type+merchant detectable (3 hits) but no category match, confidence becomes 'high' and the reassuring copy is shown instead of the 'Partial match' prompt. (2) The categoryId fallback useEffect (lines 62-70) always assigns the first category of the active type when categoryId is null, so even though parseSms returns suggestedCategoryId=null, the effect fills it in and save-tx-btn's disabled prop (!amount || !categoryId) evaluates to false.
